purpose: Pure Deps-injected implementation of the grantAdmin operation. Mirrors cancelInvitationImpl.ts. Reads live adminPubkeys at commit time, applies a superset guard, performs a concurrent-retry loop (max 2 attempts), and issues a single UpdateMetadata commit.

public_api.name: grantAdminImpl
public_api.signature: (deps: Deps, groupId: string, targetPubkey: string) => Promise<{ ok: boolean; error?: string }>
public_api.description: Grants admin status to targetPubkey in groupId. Idempotent if already admin. Rejects any set that would demote an existing admin. Retries once on commit failure to merge concurrent grants.

external_ports.name: Deps.getGroup
external_ports.description: Fetches live MLS group state including groupData.adminPubkeys

external_ports.name: Deps.Proposals.proposeUpdateMetadata
external_ports.description: Builds an UpdateMetadata proposal action; injected from marmot-ts at the MarmotContext boundary

external_ports.name: Deps.reloadGroups
external_ports.description: Triggers group reload after successful commit

external_ports.name: Deps.markBackupDirty
external_ports.description: Marks backup state as dirty after successful commit

additions: Both added to MarmotContextValue type, useMemo value object, and DEFAULT_MARMOT fallback
